BuildJob.title: BuildJob
BuildJob.description: Represents an Android APK compilation job on the cloud server

appName.description: Name of the target android application

status.description: Current status of the build compilation

logs.description: An array of log rows generated by the cloud server

downloadUrl.description: Direct download link for the completed package

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was requested

/build_jobs/{jobId}.description: Persistent record of all requested build compilations
